channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool, but scientists are not surprised
item.description: The shallow, sunny waters of the Reflecting Pool are ideal for summer algae growth, and experts say the recent renovation may have contributed.

item.title: What you need to know about the preliminary US-Iran agreement signed by Trump
item.description: An overview of the preliminary US-Iran agreement and the challenges that remain for achieving lasting peace.

item.title: US-Iran talks in Switzerland canceled; DHS to provide police with facial recognition app
item.description: Planned US-Iran talks in Switzerland have been canceled, and the Department of Homeland Security will give local police a facial recognition app.

item.title: Juneteenth: How news of the Emancipation Proclamation spread through the South
item.description: Many enslaved people learned of Lincoln's order through informal networks and rumors while the Civil War was still ongoing.
